episodes.title: Bank of America to pay US$ 72.5 million to settle Epstein accusers' lawsuit
episodes.description:
뱅크오브아메리카, 엡스틴 피해자 소송에 7,250만 달러 합의금 지급

A Manhattan federal court on Friday accepted Bank of America’s agreement to pay 72-point-5 million U.S. dollars to women who accused the bank of enabling Jeffrey Epstein’s sexual abuse.
Plaintiffs alleged the bank ignored suspicious transactions tied to Epstein, choosing profit over victim protection. Bank of America denied wrongdoing but called the settlement the right path forward.
Other banks made similar payments in 2023, with JPMorgan settling for 290 million dollars, and Deutsche Bank for 75 million.
A hearing to consider final approval is scheduled for Thursday.
